scope: Integration of GitHub Copilot CLI as a new agent provider alongside existing providers (Claude, Codex, Gemini, Cursor).
Support for both non-interactive (print/exec) and interactive (TTY/conversational) invocation modes.
Validation of provider type additions, command argument construction, availability checks, and integration with existing agent invocation logic.
Verification that Copilot provider behavior maintains parity with existing providers in error handling, TTY detection, and PATH resolution.
Confirmation that all existing provider tests and CLI functionality remain unaffected.
environmentData: **Test runner**: `bun:test` (Bun built-in); no external test framework dependencies.
**Test location**: Unit tests in `src/agent.test.ts`; manual CLI verification for end-to-end behavior.
**Fixtures**: Mock Copilot CLI binary (stubbed) for testing availability checks; sample prompts for non-interactive/interactive mode validation.
**Preconditions**: `src/agent.ts` contains existing provider definitions; tests should not modify global state.
## User Story: US-001 - Invoke Copilot CLI as a non-interactive agent

automatedTests.description: Verify `PROVIDERS` map contains `copilot` entry with correct command and non-interactive args
Verify `ensureAgentCommandAvailable` throws descriptive error when copilot binary is missing
Verify non-interactive invocation spawns process with prompt as final arg
Verify TypeScript compilation and type safety
Verify interactive invocation uses inherited stdin/stdout/stderr
Verify interactive mode uses `-i` flag instead of non-interactive flags
Verify `invokeAgent` handles copilot provider in interactive branch
Verify TypeScript compilation and type safety for interactive path
Unit test: `buildCommand("copilot")` returns expected command and args
Unit test: `ensureAgentCommandAvailable` throws when copilot binary is missing
Unit test: `invokeAgent` constructs correct args for non-interactive and interactive modes
Verify all existing tests continue to pass after copilot provider addition

exploratoryManualTests.description: Manual verification: `bun nvst define requirement --agent copilot` attempts copilot invocation
